{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphics Designer",
  "description": "The name RISHCON is built on three words RICH, SHOWY and CONTENT. These words actually bring meaning to what we want to achieve as a brand. As a digital marketing agency, we help businesses reach their digital marketing,management objectives and we aim to be the GO-TO brand in Africa and beyond when it comes to Social media Management, Content Creation, Advertising and Branding.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Candidates should possess an OND, HND qualification, or B.Sc Degree.
	Proven 2 - 5 years of graphics design experience.
	Excellent IT skills, especially with design softwares like Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Corel draw.
	Exceptional still graphic design and motion design skills.
	Ability to collaborate and work in a team.
	Exceptional creativity and innovation.
	Excellent time management, communication and organisational skills.
	A keen eye for aesthetics and attention to detail.
	An understanding of the latest trends and their role within a commercial environment.
	Professional approach to time and deadlines.
	Ability to juggle multiple projects and work under pressure.


Salary
N60,000 - N70,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio to:&nbsp;rishcon1@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Graphics Designer Job at Rishcon Digital Agency




        
    

        
        The name RISHCON is built on three words RICH, SHOWY and CONTENT. These words actually bring meaning to what we want to achieve as a brand. As a digital marketing agency, we help businesses reach their digital marketing,management objectives and we aim to be the GO-TO brand in Africa and beyond when it comes to Social media Management, Content Creation, Advertising and Branding.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphics Designer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates should possess an OND, HND qualification, or B.Sc Degree.
	Proven 2 - 5 years of graphics design experience.
	Excellent IT skills, especially with design softwares like Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Corel draw.
	Exceptional still graphic design and motion design skills.
	Ability to collaborate and work in a team.
	Exceptional creativity and innovation.
	Excellent time management, communication and organisational skills.
	A keen eye for aesthetics and attention to detail.
	An understanding of the latest trends and their role within a commercial environment.
	Professional approach to time and deadlines.
	Ability to juggle multiple projects and work under pressure.


Salary
N60,000 - N70,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio to: rishcon1@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Facility Management Officer",
  "description": "Jordan Brooke Estates is fully committed to the delivery of up-market developments to mid-market locations. It&#39;s our dream to become the standard by which real estate is measured. The core of Jordan Brooke is driven by a passion to build and desire to consistently deliver on quality and innovation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Management Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Facility Management Officer to oversee daily facility operations within our managed properties.
	The ideal candidate will ensure efficient service delivery, maintenance coordination, and compliance with operational standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise facility operations across assigned properties
	Coordinate maintenance, repairs, and vendor activities
	Monitor service charge implementation and operational budgets
	Ensure compliance with estate rules and safety standards
	Respond promptly to resident complaints and technical issues
	Conduct regular facility inspections and prepare reports.


Requirements


	HND / B.Sc. in Estate Management, Engineering, or related field
	2&ndash;4 years of experience in facility/property management
	Strong problem-solving and coordination skills
	Good communication and report-writing ability
	Ability to work with minimal supervision.


Salary
???????Competitive (Based on experience).

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;facilities@jordanbrookeestates.com&nbsp;using &quot;Facility Management Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Facility Management Officer Job at Jordan Brooke Estates




        
    

        
        Jordan Brooke Estates is fully committed to the delivery of up-market developments to mid-market locations. It's our dream to become the standard by which real estate is measured. The core of Jordan Brooke is driven by a passion to build and desire to consistently deliver on quality and innovation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Management Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Facility Management Officer to oversee daily facility operations within our managed properties.
	The ideal candidate will ensure efficient service delivery, maintenance coordination, and compliance with operational standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise facility operations across assigned properties
	Coordinate maintenance, repairs, and vendor activities
	Monitor service charge implementation and operational budgets
	Ensure compliance with estate rules and safety standards
	Respond promptly to resident complaints and technical issues
	Conduct regular facility inspections and prepare reports.


Requirements


	HND / B.Sc. in Estate Management, Engineering, or related field
	2–4 years of experience in facility/property management
	Strong problem-solving and coordination skills
	Good communication and report-writing ability
	Ability to work with minimal supervision.


Salary
???????Competitive (Based on experience).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: facilities@jordanbrookeestates.com using "Facility Management Officer" as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Manager (Oil & Gas – Pipeline Projects)",
  "description": "Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment &amp; Selection, Performance management, Training &amp; Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager (Oil &amp; Gas &ndash; Pipeline Projects)

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(Onsite)

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Project Manager with strong expertise in the Oil and Gas industry, specifically in pipeline construction and infrastructure projects.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for planning, executing, monitoring, and delivering complex oil and gas projects while ensuring compliance with industry standards, safety regulations, budget requirements, and project timelines.
	The successful candidate must possess proven experience in project bidding and tendering processes, stakeholder management, and end-to-end project lifecycle delivery within the oil and gas sector.


Job Responsibilities


	Lead and manage oil and gas pipeline projects from initiation to completion.
	Develop comprehensive project plans, schedules, budgets, and resource allocations.
	Coordinate engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning activities.
	Oversee pipeline installation, maintenance, and infrastructure development projects.
	Prepare and manage bidding, tender documentation, and contract proposals.
	Participate in prequalification processes, tender evaluations, and commercial negotiations.
	Ensure projects comply with industry regulations, safety standards, and environmental policies.
	Monitor project progress, identify risks, and implement mitigation strategies.
	Manage project budgets, cost control, forecasting, and financial reporting.
	Collaborate with clients, contractors, consultants, and government regulatory bodies.
	Lead cross-functional project teams and supervise contractors/vendors.
	Provide regular project performance reports to senior management and stakeholders.
	Ensure adherence to HSE (Health, Safety &amp; Environment) requirements.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Engineering (Mechanical, Civil, Petroleum, or related field).
	5&ndash;7 years of proven experience in the Oil &amp; Gas industry.
	Demonstrated experience managing pipeline projects and strong knowledge of project lifecycle management and engineering practices.
	Strong hands-on experience in bidding, tendering, and contract management.
	Candidates must possess one or more of the following certifications: Project Management Professional (PMP) &ndash; Project Management Institute PRINCE2 Practitioner, NEBOSH / IOSH Health &amp; Safety Certification, COREN Certification (for Engineering professionals in Nigeria) and HSE Level 1, 2 &amp; 3 Certifications (Membership of relevant professional bodies is an added advantage).
	Proven track record of successful project delivery within oil and gas operations.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
	Knowledge of Nigerian oil and gas regulatory requirements is an advantage.
	Proficiency in project management tools (MS Project, Primavera P6, or equivalent).
	Strong negotiation and commercial management skills.
	Experience working with EPC contractors.


Salary
Negotiable.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;odixcityconsulting@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-04",
  "validThrough": "2026-03-21",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Odixcity Consulting"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",

Project Manager (Oil & Gas – Pipeline Projects) Job at Odixcity Consulting




        
    

        
        Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment & Selection, Performance management, Training & Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager (Oil & Gas – Pipeline Projects)

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Project Manager with strong expertise in the Oil and Gas industry, specifically in pipeline construction and infrastructure projects.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for planning, executing, monitoring, and delivering complex oil and gas projects while ensuring compliance with industry standards, safety regulations, budget requirements, and project timelines.
	The successful candidate must possess proven experience in project bidding and tendering processes, stakeholder management, and end-to-end project lifecycle delivery within the oil and gas sector.


Job Responsibilities


	Lead and manage oil and gas pipeline projects from initiation to completion.
	Develop comprehensive project plans, schedules, budgets, and resource allocations.
	Coordinate engineering, procurement, construction, and commissioning activities.
	Oversee pipeline installation, maintenance, and infrastructure development projects.
	Prepare and manage bidding, tender documentation, and contract proposals.
	Participate in prequalification processes, tender evaluations, and commercial negotiations.
	Ensure projects comply with industry regulations, safety standards, and environmental policies.
	Monitor project progress, identify risks, and implement mitigation strategies.
	Manage project budgets, cost control, forecasting, and financial reporting.
	Collaborate with clients, contractors, consultants, and government regulatory bodies.
	Lead cross-functional project teams and supervise contractors/vendors.
	Provide regular project performance reports to senior management and stakeholders.
	Ensure adherence to HSE (Health, Safety & Environment) requirements.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering (Mechanical, Civil, Petroleum, or related field).
	5–7 years of proven experience in the Oil & Gas industry.
	Demonstrated experience managing pipeline projects and strong knowledge of project lifecycle management and engineering practices.
	Strong hands-on experience in bidding, tendering, and contract management.
	Candidates must possess one or more of the following certifications: Project Management Professional (PMP) – Project Management Institute PRINCE2 Practitioner, NEBOSH / IOSH Health & Safety Certification, COREN Certification (for Engineering professionals in Nigeria) and HSE Level 1, 2 & 3 Certifications (Membership of relevant professional bodies is an added advantage).
	Proven track record of successful project delivery within oil and gas operations.
	Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
	Knowledge of Nigerian oil and gas regulatory requirements is an advantage.
	Proficiency in project management tools (MS Project, Primavera P6, or equivalent).
	Strong negotiation and commercial management skills.
	Experience working with EPC contractors.


Salary
Negotiable.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: odixcityconsulting@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Telesales Personnel Job at Macden Communications Limited




        
    

        
        Macden Communications Limited is into the supply and distribution of beverages and is a major supplier for International Breweries Plc, Nigerian Breweries Limited, Guiness Nigerian Limited.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Telesales Personnel

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time
Working hours and days: 8am to 6pm and from Mondays to Saturdays and Public Holidays.

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Handling inbound sales to sell products, services
	Responding to customers inquiries timeously through telephone calls
	Customer Care Services
	Customer Engagement
	Target Achievement
	Relationship Building


Requirements


	The company is looking for young energetic and fresh graduates of between one to two years working experience as a sales representatives.
	Interested applicants should apply within the port harcourt axis of rivers state


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: patricia_asemota@yahoo.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more inquiries, candidates should call: 09063461304.
